title: Childhood vaccines: parental attitudes survey 2025
body: "The UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) designed an online survey to find out what parents of children aged 2 months to 4 years think about vaccination. UKHSA commissioned the commercial research organisation, IPSOS, to undertake the survey on their behalf.  Download a slide set of the survey findings.  Download a spreadsheet of the survey data.  "
